creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
Hi,

On 11:14 Tue 14 Jun, Frederic Culot wrote:

>=20
> for some reasons this PR did not trigger an email notification so that
> you could be asked to review the submitted patch fo mysqlupdate.
>=20
> Could you please let me know if you approve the patch sent by Ryan?
>=20

the mysqlbackup 2.5 (not 1.5 as it told in PR) version has been under
development so I don't publish it to the world. But if there is an
active interest, I'll check if I've done all I wanted and approve or
update that PR soon. So please don't commit yet - checksums may change.

All the best,
--=20
Alexey V. Degtyarev
